body: ## Purpose Adds the derivative of dkappa_m / drho. It's a small term and probably doesn't help with stability. FWIW it reduces the error when comparing to autodiff. Also fixes a bug in mass flux Jacobian. ## To-do ## Content ---- - [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: change jacobian terms related to dpdrho
